seoTitle: Bartle Frere vs Basalt — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Bartle Frere and Basalt. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Bartle Frere vs Basalt: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Bartle Frere and Basalt.
heading: Bartle Frere vs Basalt — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Bartle Frere, Queensland and Basalt, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Basalt has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Bartle Frere (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Bartle Frere or Basalt safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Bartle Frere has a flood risk score of 41/100, while Basalt scores 53/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Bartle Frere scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. Basalt scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Bartle Frere or Basalt?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Basalt has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
